_note: 확정 데이터 배선(v6). 효능동사 0, 설명가능 표현만. 제품명·용량·성분=박스 사실. 이미지=키워드 SEO명(홈과 동일 자산). msrp='00.00'=플레이스홀더(대표 실가 대기). pos=object-position(받침 프레임밖).

body.value: m'Aaile is organized around ampoule-format skincare, formulated with ingredients such as PDRN, Centella (CICA), hyaluronic acid, and EGF. The line runs from toner and lotion through essence and ampoule, presented with a clean, considered finish.

products._note: 제품 데이터는 products.json 정본에서 파생(중복 제거). 여기엔 섹션 카피만 유지.
products.title: A selection from the line.

body.value: Tell us about your market and we will follow up about carrying m'Aaile.
